title: Coloristic
description: A mod that adds color correction to Minecraft
body:
# Summary
Coloristic - is a client-side mod for post proccessing. This mod uses Satin API for manipulating with shaders. You can enter the world and edit the color correction in the special window.

# Presets
You can save your color correction variants in custom presets. For this make your color correction, enter the special window, type the name of preset and save it. There will be created new folder in _.minecraft_ directory. There are all the presets and preset icons in this folder. If you make custom icon, just put it in the directory and rename with preset name.
